name: (Evil) Peppino
description:
former anxious chef, gone bad ||                                                    
                                                                                          

Underfell-like AU Peppino where he goes down a more violent path in life, ultimately changing himself and those around him. Other characters are oriented to fit this AU, including: Gustavo, Fake Peppino, and The Noise, who takes on a new persona.

(pfp cred to: @el_crazy_gat0 on tiktok)
update: changed lore to fit his character better.
